title: Verify existing implementation of rate limit check
description: The `checkRateLimit(key: string, maxRequests: number, windowMs: number): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter?: number }` function already exists in `src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.ts` with 7 passing tests in `src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.test.ts`. Verified implementation uses in-memory Map with proper window expiration, independent key tracking, and reset functionality.
existing_patterns: src/utils/result.ts - Result discriminated union pattern (not directly used here but shows error handling approach)
